Cravelle International Trade

EU and MENA only.

We coordinate cross-border commerce between the EU and the Middle East and North Africa, connecting businesses with sourcing, logistics, and market entry support.

Request a Consultation Learn More

What We Do

We coordinate between European suppliers and MENA-based buyers (and vice versa), supporting the full lifecycle of a trade relationship.

Product Sourcing & Supplier Matching

We identify verified suppliers in Poland and the EU for MENA importers, and connect EU exporters with vetted distributors in the GCC, Levant, and North Africa.

Logistics & Shipping Coordination

Full shipment coordination including freight forwarding quotes, customs documentation support, and Incoterms advisory.

Regulatory & Compliance Guidance

Help with EU CE marking, import/export permits, halal certification requirements, and country-specific trade regulations.

Market Entry Advisory

Market research, competitor mapping, and go-to-market planning for businesses looking to enter EU or MENA markets.

Bilingual Business Support

Contract translation, meeting interpretation, and culturally adapted communications in English, Arabic, Polish, and Turkish.

Products & Sectors We Cover

Food & Beverages

Halal-certified food products, dairy, confectionery, Polish specialities, and packaged FMCG for Middle Eastern markets.

Construction & Building Materials

European-grade steel, ceramics, fixtures, and architectural materials sourced for Gulf region development projects.

Cosmetics & Personal Care

European cosmetics and skincare brands looking for MENA distribution, including help with local labelling and import regulations.

Industrial & Technical Equipment

Machinery, spare parts, and industrial supplies from Eastern European manufacturers to MENA-based industrial buyers.

Textiles & Fashion

EU textile sourcing and private-label manufacturing support for MENA retail and fashion brands.

How We Work

A clear, step-by-step approach to every trade engagement.

1

Discovery & Needs Assessment

We start with a consultation to understand your product, target market, volume, and timeline.

2

Market Research & Partner Identification

We research the relevant market, find qualified suppliers or buyers, and prepare a shortlist with verified references.

3

Introduction & Negotiation Support

We handle introductions, support price and terms negotiations, and arrange virtual or in-person meetings.

4

Execution & Logistics

We coordinate shipping, documentation, customs clearance, and delivery on your behalf.

5

Post-Trade Support

Ongoing relationship management, quality follow-up, and repeat-order coordination for long-term partnerships.

Transparency & Disclaimer

Cravelle acts as a commercial intermediary and trade coordination provider. We do not hold inventory, act as a licensed customs broker, or serve as a party to any sales or purchase contract between buyer and seller.

All product sourcing, logistics, and regulatory guidance services are provided on a best-effort coordination basis. Cravelle does not guarantee the outcome of any trade transaction and is not liable for goods, shipping delays, or third-party compliance failures.

Clients should conduct their own due diligence and seek independent legal and financial advice where appropriate. Our services are subject to our general Terms & Conditions.
